explanations.1: This line tells the system to use the sh shell to run this script, finding it automatically from your system's PATH.
explanations.3: The [[ ! -f /data/counter.txt ]] checks if the file does NOT exist; the ! means 'not' and -f means 'is this a file'.
explanations.9: This reads the current counter value from the file, adds 1 to it using backticks (which run the cat command), and stores the result in the counter variable.
